nodes.name: Cuando el orquestador llama
nodes.notes: Worker 100% genérico: todo lo específico del sitio viene en config (sources.config). Agregar un sitio nuevo NO requiere tocar este workflow.

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/125.0 Safari/537.36

nodes.name: Fetch Pagina
nodes.notes: onError=continue: si una página cae, las demás igual se procesan.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO products (
  source_id, source_platform, external_id, name, description, category,
  price, currency, availability, image_url, product_url, seller_name, location, scraped_at
)
VALUES ($1, 'local', $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, true, $8, $9, $10, $11, now())
ON CONFLICT (source_id, external_id) DO UPDATE SET
  name         = EXCLUDED.name,
  description  = EXCLUDED.description,
  category     = EXCLUDED.category,
  price        = EXCLUDED.price,
  currency     = EXCLUDED.currency,
  availability = true,
  image_url    = EXCLUDED.image_url,
  product_url  = EXCLUDED.product_url,
  location     = EXCLUDED.location,
  scraped_at   = now(),
  updated_at   = now();

INSERT INTO scrape_runs (source_id, source_type, status, items_found, items_upserted, error_message, finished_at)
VALUES ($1, 'local_scrape', $2, $3, $4, $5, now());

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (() => { const found = $('Parsear HTML').all().filter(i => i.json.external_id).length; const fallos = $('Fetch Pagina').all().filter(i => i.json.error).length; const status = fallos === 0 && found > 0 ? 'success' : (found > 0 ? 'partial' : 'error'); return [ $('Cuando el orquestador llama').first().json.source_id, status, found, found, fallos > 0 ? `${fallos} pagina(s) fallaron al descargar` : null ]; })() }}
